name: 毕万 (Bi Wan)
title: Founder
notes: Enfeoffed at Wei, served Duke Xian of Jin

name: 魏武子 (Wei Wuzi)
title: Daifu
notes: Served Prince Chong'er, followed him into exile for 19 years

name: 魏绛 (Wei Jiang)
title: Daifu, Posthumous: 昭子 (Zhaozi)
notes: Served Duke Dao of Jin, made peace with Rong and Di tribes

name: 魏献子 (Wei Xianzi)
title: Jin Minister
notes: Administered state affairs for Jin, one of the Six Ministers

name: 魏侈 (Wei Chi)
title: Jin Minister
notes: Attacked Fan and Zhonghang clans with Zhao Jianzi

name: 魏桓子 (Wei Huanzi)
title: Jin Minister
notes: With Han Kangzi and Zhao Xiangzi, destroyed Zhi Bo and divided his territory

name: 魏文侯 (Marquis Wen of Wei)
title: Marquis
notes: First marquis, Wei recognized as feudal state in year 22

name: 魏惠王 (King Hui of Wei)
title: King
notes: Moved capital to Daliang, first to take royal title

name: 魏安釐王 (King Anxi of Wei)
title: King

name: 魏景湣王 (King Jingmin of Wei)
title: King
notes: Son of King Anxi, originally Crown Prince Zeng

name: 魏王假 (King Jia of Wei)
title: King
notes: Last ruler of Wei, captured by Qin in year 3
